description: You are an Information Security Engineer at a cybersecurity firm. Find and fix five critical bugs in the protocol parsing modules of the Python-based network packet analysis tool at /home/ga/workspace/packet_dissector/. The bugs cause valid packets to be flagged as corrupt, TCP streams to break, DNS names to be garbled, HTTP body lengths to be miscalculated, and TLS 1.3 connections to be misclassified.
